name: Sterimar Nasal Hygiene (2pcs)
description: Bundle of 2 Sterimar Isotonic Nasal Sprays. 100% natural sea water based formula to help clear and cleanse nasal passages gently. Ideal for daily hygiene for children and adults.

name: Nasal Drops (1pc)
description: Gentle saline nasal drops to alleviate nasal congestion caused by colds or allergies. Easy-to-use dropper bottle for precise application, safe for pediatric use.

name: Orezinc Oral Solution (1pc)
description: Zinc supplement solution used as an adjunct to oral rehydration in the management of diarrhea. Supports immune function and promotes faster recovery.

name: Oxygen Tubing / Selang Oksigen (3pcs)
description: Soft and flexible oxygen nasal cannulas. Non-kinking design ensures continuous oxygen flow. Standard connectors compatible with most home concentrators and tanks.

name: Blue Line Tracheostomy Tube 3.0 (1pc)
description: Portex Blue Line Tracheostomy Tube, Size 3.0 ID. Cuffed/Uncuffed design tailored for neonatal/pediatric patients. Features a pilot balloon for pressure monitoring.

name: Suction Connecting Tube (2pcs)
description: Sterile suction connecting tubes with hex-connectors. High-quality, non-conductive tubing for use with medical suction canisters and machines.

name: Disposable Manual Resuscitator (1pc)
description: PVC Manual Resuscitator (Ambu Bag) for pediatric use. Disposable design prevents cross-contamination. Includes oxygen reservoir bag and anatomical mask.

name: Portable Suction Filter 7E (6pcs)
description: Hydrophobic bacterial filters for 7E series portable suction machines. Protects the device from contamination and ensures hygienic operation. Pack of 6.

name: Pediatric/Neonatal Mini Trach (3pcs)
description: Mini-Trach kit components for pediatric airway management. Essential for suctioning and subglottic access in tracheostomy care.

name: Extension Tube Type 1 (1pc)
description: High-pressure extension line for IV or respiratory circuits. Luer lock connectors ensure secure attachment. Kink-resistant and transparent for flow monitoring.

name: Optilube Lubricating Jelly (1pc)
description: Water-soluble sterile lubricating jelly. Ideal for easy insertion of tracheostomy tubes and catheters. Non-greasy and pH balanced.

name: Neonatal Resuscitation Device (1pc)
description: Specialized T-Piece resuscitator or manual bag for neonatal life support. Precise pressure control for delicate neonate lungs.

name: Tracheal Tube / ET Tube (1pc)
description: Sterile Endotracheal tube with high-volume, low-pressure cuff. Murphy eye for safety. Graduated markings for easy depth control.

name: Elbow Adapter / Circuit Elbow (1pc)
description: Swivel elbow adapter for connection between tracheostomy tube and breathing circuit. Minimized dead space and lightweight design.

name: Trach Strap / Neck Band (1pc)
description: Adjustable tracheostomy tube holder with Velcro closures. Soft, moisture-wicking foam lining protects skin and prevents irritation.

name: HME Filter (2pcs)
description: Heat and Moisture Exchangers (HME) for tracheostomy patients. Traps heat and moisture from exhaled breath and returns it upon inhalation.
